actionsMenu.renamePrompt: Please give a new name for {name}.

addFilestoreDialog.filesystemHelp: Your sysadmin needs to configure a file system before it appears here.
addFilestoreDialog.folderHelp: You can configure multiple Filestores from the same File system with different top-level folders, to facilitate accessing deeply-nested content.
addFilestoreDialog.folderStep: Select the top-level Folder for the Filestore
addFilestoreDialog.folderStepLabel: Select the top-level Folder for the Filestore
addFilestoreDialog.nameHelp: This name is used in RSpace to help you identify the Filestore.

landingPage.filestoreEnabledError: Error checking if filestores are enabled.

mainPanel.carouselViewDesc: Flick through all files to find one.

moveDialog.description: Choose a folder or tap the "top-level" button.
moveDialog.title: Move

moveToIrods.description: You have selected {count} {count, plural, one {item} other {items}} to move to the iRODS server
moveToIrods.descriptionSuffix: . By default, the items will be added to iRODS and removed from RSpace. You will be able to link to the iRODS items inside of RSpace documents and include them into any exports through our iRODS integration.

destination.explanation: The available folders are configured in the Gallery's filestore section.
destination.label: Destination in iRODS

errors.misconfigured: Please check with your System Admin to ensure iRODS is correctly configured.

noFilestoreConfigured.body: Add a new one in the filestore section of the Gallery or speak to your system administrator.
noFilestoreConfigured.title: No iRODS filestore has been configured.

login.prompt: Please provide your login credentials for {serverUrl}

moveToIrods.title: Move to iRODS

destination.explanation: The available filestores are configured in the Gallery's filestore section.
destination.label: Destination S3 filestore

errors.misconfigured: Please check with your System Admin to ensure the S3 filestore is correctly configured.

noFilestoreConfigured.body: Add a new one in the filestore section of the Gallery or speak to your system administrator.
noFilestoreConfigured.title: No S3 filestore has been configured.

noWriteAccess.body: Your account is not on the write allowlist for any S3 filestore. Ask your system administrator if you need write access.
noWriteAccess.title: You do not have write access to any S3 filestore.

moveToS3.moveDescription: You have selected {count} {count, plural, one {item} other {items}} to move to S3. By default, the items will be added to S3 and removed from RSpace. You will be able to link to the S3 items inside of RSpace documents.
moveToS3.retainSourceCopy: Retain a copy on source bucket
moveToS3.transferDescription: You have selected {count} {count, plural, one {item} other {items}} to transfer to another S3 bucket. By default, the items will be copied to the destination and deleted from the source.

sidebar.createFolderPrompt: Please give the new folder a name.
sidebar.noFilestoresConfigured: System Admin has not configured any external filestores.
